name: Turnip28 Core Rules v17
description: Official Turnip28 v17 core rules — unit types, equipment, and army composition

black_powder.name: Black Powder Weapons
black_powder.description: Rusted relics. Generate powder smoke token when shooting — can't shoot again until next round.

missile.name: Missile Weapons
missile.description: Bows, slings, crossbows. Target's Vulnerability reduced by 2 when shot at.

close_combat.name: Close Combat Weapons
close_combat.description: -1 Inaccuracy for melee attacks. May re-roll charge distance dice (must accept new result).

pistols_and_sabres.name: Pistols and Sabres
pistols_and_sabres.description: Snob equipment. No powder smoke when shooting. Not considered close combat weapons.

safety_in_numbers.name: Safety in Numbers
safety_in_numbers.description: If the unit contains 8 or more models, it is Fearless.

sharpshooters.name: Sharpshooters
sharpshooters.description: When shooting or charging, this unit can target any enemy unit, not just the closest.

skirmish.name: Skirmish
skirmish.description: When this unit is the target of a shooting attack, increase the Inaccuracy of the shooter by 2.

fearless.name: Fearless
fearless.description: Every time this unit is required to retreat, on a 3+ it does not retreat (treated as passed panic test).

vanguard.name: Vanguard
vanguard.description: After deployment, move this unit up to its Movement characteristic before the game starts.

dash.name: Dash
dash.description: This unit may make a free move up to its Movement characteristic after completing an order.

bowel_loosening_charge.name: Bowel-Loosening Charge
bowel_loosening_charge.description: When this unit charges, the target must re-roll any successful panic tests.

unstable_icon.name: Unstable Icon
unstable_icon.description: If this unit is charged, the charging unit must take a dangerous terrain test.

stubborn_fanatics.name: Stubborn Fanatics
stubborn_fanatics.description: This unit never retreats. If it would retreat, it stays in place.

preliminary_bombardment.name: Preliminary Bombardment
preliminary_bombardment.description: Before the game starts, this unit makes one free shooting attack against the closest enemy unit.

immobile.name: Immobile
immobile.description: This unit can never be moved for any reason.

toff_off.name: Toff Off!
toff_off.description: When Made Ready within 18" and LOS of enemy Toff, may propose a duel. Opponent must accept. Both Toffs make simultaneous melee attacks until one perishes.

Toff.description: Aristocratic Cult leader. Command range 6". A Regiment may only have one Toff.

Fodder.description: The masses. 12 malnourished saps in tight order. Fearless at 8+ models.

Chaff.description: Light skirmishers. Can target any enemy. Hard to hit with shooting (+2 I for shooters).

Brutes.description: Dedicated fanatics. Fearless (3+ to ignore retreat). Deploy forward with Vanguard.

Whelps.description: Fast raiders. Free move after completing an order.

Bastards.description: Reckless heavy cavalry. Targets must re-roll successful panic tests when charged.

StumpGun.description: Ancient cannon. Immobile. Round Shot (48", 3 wounds no save) or Grape Shot (12", 5 dice).

composition.notes: Standard 3-Snob game: 1 Toff (2 Followers) + 2 Toadies (1 Follower each) = 7 units total

presets.name: Balanced Regiment
presets.description: A well-rounded force with a mix of infantry and firepower.

presets.name: Cavalry Rush
presets.description: Fast-moving force built around mounted units.

presets.name: Melee Horde
presets.description: Close combat specialists with maximum bodies.
